hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys
try:
    d = json.load(sys.stdin)
    cmd = d.get('tool_input', {}).get('command', '')
    if 'git commit' in cmd and '-m' in cmd:
        msg = cmd.split('-m')[1].strip().strip('\"').strip(\"'\")
        valid_types = 'feat|fix|perf|refactor|docs|test|chore|ci|style|revert|security|arch'
        import re
        if re.match(rf'^({valid_types})(\([a-zA-Z0-9_./-]+\))?: .+', msg):
            print(json.dumps({'continue': True, 'systemMessage': '✓ 提交信息格式正确'}))
        elif msg.startswith('Merge'):
            print(json.dumps({'continue': True}))
        else:
            print(json.dumps({'continue': True, 'systemMessage': '⚠ 提交信息不符合约定式提交格式。建议: type(scope): description。类型: feat/fix/perf/refactor/docs/test/chore/ci/revert/security/arch'}))
except: pass
"
